side_effects.description: Stinging at injection site during first few injections, resolved after massaging post-injection and allowing product to reach room temperature before injecting
Small lumps at injection site after first few injections, resolved after a few days
Muscle spasming and twitching at injection site where a small lump formed, believed to be caused by injecting twice in the same spot

protocol_notes: Injecting subcutaneously into abdomen. Adopted practice of massaging after injection and allowing product to reach room temperature before use, which resolved stinging. One site has a persistent lump possibly due to double injection at same location.
